parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: (() => { const n = $json.fileName; const d = n.lastIndexOf('.'); return d > -1 ? n.slice(0, d) + '_DONE' + n.slice(d) : n + '_DONE'; })() }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const staticData = $getWorkflowStaticData('global');
return [{ json: { done: true, totalProcessed: staticData.totalProcessed, totalErrors: staticData.totalErrors } }];
